welcome.title: Welcome to MONA Live
welcome.subtitle: Your AI assistant for structured interviews
welcome.whatDesc: MONA listens to your interview and provides real-time suggestions for better questions, consistency checks, and automatic evaluation.
welcome.step1short: From database or just enter a name
welcome.step1desc: Choose an applicant from your database or simply enter a name.
welcome.step2desc: Copilot listens in, transcribes, and gives you real-time suggestions for follow-up questions.
welcome.step3desc: After the conversation, receive an AI-powered scorecard with ratings and next steps.
welcome.audioStep1: Allow microphone — MONA needs access to your microphone
welcome.audioStep2: Capture your partner — Choose 'Screen Share' for video calls
welcome.audioTip: Tip: For video calls (Teams, Zoom), just select 'Screen Share' to also capture your conversation partner.
welcome.privacy1: Audio is only processed during the interview
welcome.privacy2: Transcripts are stored locally on your device
welcome.privacy3: No sharing with third parties without your consent
welcome.privacy4: GDPR compliant and hosted in Germany
welcome.privacyNote: You maintain full control over your interview data. You can delete scorecards at any time.

auth.title: Sign In
auth.subtitle: Sign in via MONA Platform
auth.expired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.haveKey: I already have an API key
tips: MONA gives you real-time suggestions for better questions during the interview.
After the conversation, MONA automatically creates a structured scorecard.
Works with Zoom, Teams, Google Meet, WhatsApp, and in-person conversations.
50% less note-taking effort – MONA takes notes for you.
Ask MONA anything mid-call – about this meeting or past conversations.
Paste a job posting and MONA automatically creates an interview checklist.
Audio is only processed during the interview – 100% GDPR compliant.

session.setupPromptLabel: What should the AI focus on?
session.setupPromptPlaceholder: e.g. Focus on teamwork and resilience...
session.consentMissing: Candidate has not consented to AI assistance

preflight.title: Quick Setup
preflight.subtitle: So MONA can help you
preflight.callTypeTitle: How are you conducting the interview?
preflight.videoTip: For video calls, your conversation partner will also be recorded when you select 'Screen Share' next.
preflight.privacyNote: Audio is only processed during the interview and not permanently stored. GDPR compliant.

errors.aiNotConfigured: AI assistant not configured. Please contact your administrator.
errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please sign in again.
errors.connectionFailed: Connection to AI service failed. Please check your internet connection.
errors.microphoneDenied: Microphone access denied. Please allow access in system settings.
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

applicant.noResultsHint: Use Quick Start above to begin without a database.

connection.offlineBanner: Copilot offline — interview notes still being recorded by MONA

setup.prepDescription: These fields are optional, but help MONA give you better suggestions.
setup.jobPostingHelp: Paste the job posting here. MONA will automatically create a requirements checklist that gets checked off during the interview.
setup.jobPostingPlaceholder:
Paste job posting here...

Example:
We are looking for an experienced software developer (m/f/d) with...
setup.jobPostingSkip: You'll still get question suggestions without a job posting
setup.promptHelp: Optional: Give MONA special instructions, e.g., what to focus on or which questions are important.
setup.promptPlaceholder: e.g. 'Ask especially about teamwork' or 'Focus on Python experience'

settings.title: Settings
settings.betaDescription: Enable experimental features like Job Intake and Sales mode

jobIntake.title: Job Intake
jobIntake.subtitle: Capture requirements from the customer for a new position
jobIntake.hint: In Job Intake mode, you capture the requirements your customer mentions for the position to be filled. After the call, you can export the requirements list for your CRM.
jobIntake.noRequirementsHint: Add requirements as the customer mentions them
jobIntake.roadmapHint: Define the steps of your pitch. You'll be guided through them during the call.
jobIntake.checklistHint: Points you should mention during the conversation.

sales.title: Sales Call
sales.subtitle: Pitch conversation with customer
sales.dealPlaceholder: e.g. Blue Arrow Demo, Enterprise Pitch...
sales.hint: Paste your pitch guide (e.g. from Notion, Google Docs) into the text field and let AI automatically extract the steps and checklist items.
sales.pitchHint: Paste your pitch guide, demo script, or sales playbook here:
sales.pitchPlaceholder:
Paste pitch document here...

Example:
# Demo Journey
## Act 1: Introduction
- Present company
- Show the problem

## Act 2: Solution
...
